title: Picasso
description: Casso is a specialized client-side mod pack created to boost frames per second (FPS) in Minecraft. This mod pack includes a selection of performance-enhancing mods that optimize the game's rendering processes, and reduce lag.
body:
Casso is a specialized client-side mod pack created to boost frames per second (FPS) in Minecraft. This mod pack includes a selection of performance-enhancing mods that optimize the game's rendering processes, and reduce lag.
Piccso also contains several qol mods to make your expirence better. (Quality of Life)

**Do you want an easy to install modpack with everything you need to hop into a world and start playing?**

 Then Piccaso is for you!


<details>
<summary>The only custom code:</summary>


```
java.public(have.fun)
```


</details>
